title: Be Civic — Procedures registry + substrate version stamp
description: Validates the two hidden-surface state files introduced in W33 (§6 + §1c). `procedures.json` is the registry of every procedure the user has under way on this substrate, replacing the legacy per-procedure case.json machinery state. `version.json` is the substrate schema-version stamp the preamble migration runner reads to decide which ordered migration steps to run. Both live in ${SUBSTRATE_STATE} (= ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}) and are committed by the auto-commit monitor (they are in the hidden-surface .gitignore allowlist).

slug.description: Folder-safe identifier for this procedure's case content under ${SUBSTRATE_DATA}/<slug>/. Lowercase kebab-case.

process_id.description: Canonical Be Civic Process id this procedure instantiates (V2 entity; renamed from V1 skill_id). Matches a process in /api/manifest.

process_version.description: Pinned Process version at the time the procedure was started (renamed from V1 skill_version). Lets the harness detect when the canonical Process has moved on.

status.description: Lifecycle state of this procedure instance. `active` = currently in progress; `paused` = intentionally set down; `completed` = the procedure reached its terminal outcome; `abandoned` = inferred-dead (e.g. orphan-buffer sweep).

schema_version.description: Registry schema version sentinel. 1 for the W33 shape.

procedures.description: Every procedure instance on this substrate. May be empty (no procedure started yet). Slugs are unique within the array.

versionStamp.description: Shape of ${SUBSTRATE_STATE}/version.json (handbook 40-substrate §7.1). `state_version` is the schema version the on-disk state was last migrated to; the preamble migration runner compares it to the CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION constant baked into preamble.py (the schema version this plugin build targets, == §7.1 `plugin_version`). When state_version < CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION the runner applies the ordered migration steps in between, then bumps state_version. `plugin_version` records the plugin/manifest version that last wrote the stamp; `migrated_at` records the last successful migration time.

state_version.description: Schema version the on-disk substrate state was last migrated to (handbook §7.1). Compared against preamble.py CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION.

plugin_version.description: Version of the harness code that last wrote this stamp, read from the shipped manifest in ${SUBSTRATE_ROOT} (e.g. "0.3.0"). Provenance; the integer state_version drives migration decisions.

$comment: This file defines two shapes via $defs. procedures.json validates against #/$defs/proceduresRegistry; version.json validates against #/$defs/versionStamp. The top-level oneOf lets a validator check an arbitrary object against either shape; consumers that know which file they hold should $ref the specific $def directly. version.json field names follow handbook 40-substrate §7.1 (state_version / plugin_version), not the procedures-registry's schema_version sentinel.
